title: ferray-ma: no fix_invalid (auto-mask NaN + replace with fill_value)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's ma.fix_invalid(a, fill_value) masks NaN/Inf values AND replaces them with the fill_value in the data. ferray-ma has masked_invalid (which masks NaN/Inf) but doesn't replace the underlying data values. fix_invalid is useful for cleaning data in a single call.
